meta.title: 2026 Event Trip Planners — Free, for Groups
meta.description: Plan your 2026 event trip with WePlanify. Dedicated free planners for the FIFA World Cup, Champions League Final, Tomorrowland, Hellfest, Ultra Europe and the total solar eclipse — built for groups of fans who travel together.

hero.title:
Plan your 2026
event trip — together
hero.description: Six dedicated planners for the year's biggest events. Pick yours, build a shared itinerary, split costs and coordinate the squad — all free.

intro.title: One planner per event, built for groups
intro.body: Big events bring big logistics: matches across host cities, festival passes for a 12-person crew, camping permits, last-minute date clashes. Each of our 2026 event pages is built for that specific event — host-city tables, real schedules, the gotchas only fans hit. Pick yours below.

cta.title: Not heading to one of these? Plan your own group trip.
cta.description: WePlanify works for any group trip — bachelorette, birthday, family, road trip, anything else. Same shared kitty, itinerary, polls and packing list.

events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
events.description: 16 host cities across three countries. Plan your multi-city route, split costs by category, and coordinate the fan group across borders.

events.title: Champions League Final 2026
events.description: The biggest club final of the year at the Puskás Aréna. Plan transport, hotel and pre-match meetup for the squad.

events.title: Hellfest 2026
events.description: Four days of metal in Clisson. Camping logistics, carpool, and the lineup-to-stage spreadsheet — all in one shared plan.

events.title: Tomorrowland 2026
events.description: DreamVille tickets, festival passes, train logistics. Coordinate the squad and the shared kitty so nobody chases anyone for €40 the week after.

events.title: Total Solar Eclipse — Aug 12, 2026
events.description: The once-a-decade trip to totality. Best viewing spots, weather contingencies, accommodation that gets booked out 18 months ahead.

events.title: Ultra Europe 2026
events.description: Three days on the Adriatic. Hotel vs Airbnb, festival pass logistics, and side trips around Dalmatia — for the squad that wants more than just the main stage.
